steps.t: Erling Goodbody can be found in the thoroughfare in front of the Prancing Pony. Pada, a widely-respected Minstrel, has asked you to cheer a friend of …
Speak with Erling and let him know that Pada sends his best.
Pada is in the Foundations of Stone in Moria. You should return to Pada and tell him that his friend Erling Goodbody was very pleased with the song yo…
